name: EuiSearchBar
description: Structured search input with filter pills and query syntax support.

defaultQuery.description: The initial query the bar will hold when first mounted

query.description: If you wish to use the search bar as a controlled component, continuously pass the query via this prop.

box.description: Configures the search box. Set `placeholder` to change the placeholder text in the box and `incremental` to support incremental (as you type) search.

filters.description: An array of search filters. See {@link SearchFilterConfig}.

toolsLeft.description: Tools which go to the left of the search bar.

toolsRight.description: Tools which go to the right of the search bar.

dateFormat.description: Date formatter to use when parsing date values

hint.description: Hint to render below the search bar
